_comment: Manual review decisions captured from the 2026-04-16 review round. Decisions apply by reel_id + field_key to all matching candidate rows in the review workbook.

decision_binding.notes: Do not apply by model-only match. Keep patch rows bound to detail_id, reel_id, model_year, and SKU when available.

decisions.review_note: Correct and acceptable, but this appears to describe the 2021 ANTARES DC generation.
decisions.year_scope_note: Bind to 2021 ANTARES DC. Same-series body material may differ across other years.
decisions.fitment_note: Future apply must keep reel_id + year/version + SKU binding.

decisions.review_note: Reject candidate 'metal frames' because it is not a specific material.
decisions.rejected_candidate_reason: Candidate is generic wording, not an explicit material field.
decisions.year_scope_note: Bind to 2023 ANTARES DC MD. Same-series body material may differ across other years.
decisions.fitment_note: Manual override based on review knowledge: 2023 ANTARES DC MD body material is Magnesium.

decisions.approved_value: CORESOLID BODY 镁合金一体成型
decisions.review_note: Reject candidate 'Core solid metal body' because it is a technology phrase, not a precise material expression.
decisions.rejected_candidate_reason: Candidate is marketing/technology wording rather than the reviewed body material statement.
decisions.year_scope_note: Bind to 2024 Metanium DC. Body material wording may differ across other Metanium DC years.
decisions.fitment_note: Manual override based on review knowledge: 2024 Metanium DC uses CORESOLID BODY magnesium one-piece body wording.

decisions.review_note: Correct and acceptable, but keep year awareness for other Metanium DC generations.
decisions.year_scope_note: Bind to 2024 Metanium DC. Gear material may differ across other Metanium DC years.
decisions.fitment_note: Future apply must keep reel_id + year/version + SKU binding.

decisions.approved_value: Fully machined aluminum body and side plates
decisions.review_note: Correct and acceptable, but keep year awareness for future generations.
decisions.year_scope_note: Do not spread by model-only match. Keep reel_id and SKU binding until year/version is confirmed.
decisions.fitment_note: Future apply must keep reel_id + year/version + SKU binding.

decisions.review_note: Reject candidate 'Hagane body system' because it is a technology/system term, not the actual material wording.
decisions.rejected_candidate_reason: Candidate is a technology/system phrase instead of a specific body material.
decisions.year_scope_note: Aldebaran BFS body material must stay bound to reel_id and SKU until year/version is confirmed.
decisions.fitment_note: Manual override based on review knowledge: body wording should reflect Magnesium / HAGANE body, not 'Hagane body system'.
